body: Thanks for your note, [Anna](people/anna-petrov) — really appreciated you sharing your read on the current seed market dynamics, especially given how much compression we're seeing in round sizes on the climate side. I've been sitting with your point about founders over-indexing on government grants as a validation signal, and I think you're right that it can mask underlying commercial traction in ways that make our diligence harder. At Halfway we've been stress-testing a few of our pipeline companies against that exact lens this quarter, and it's already surfaced some uncomfortable conversations worth having early. I'd love to carve out some time in the next few weeks to walk through one or two of those situations with you — your pattern recognition on team risk in particular would be invaluable. Would a call the week of July 21st work on your end?
